scripts.package: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('dist'))fs.mkdirSync('dist');['main.js','preload.js','server.js','index.html'].forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(f,'dist/'+f));require('child_process').execSync('copy /Y Res dist\\Res');" && npm run minify && electron-packager dist 千年江湖 --win --out=../Build --asar && node -e "require('child_process').execSync('rd /s /q dist');" || node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('rd /s /q dist')}catch(e){}"
